---
name: Documentation improvement
description: Improve README, docs, examples, or explanations
title: "docs: "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

## Context

What part of the documentation is unclear, missing, or outdated?

## Proposed change

What should be added, clarified, or corrected?

## Validation

How can the change be checked?

Examples:

- links checked
- command examples reviewed
- Terraform or Atmos command names verified

## Notes

Any related files, follow-up work, or assumptions.
